subject: SEO Update — ARLO — 2026-07-20
html:
PageWhat ChangedTarget KeywordCheck It
/compare (new)New comparison hub/index page — a card grid linking to all 4 live comparison pages (Windsor.ai, Supermetrics, AgencyAnalytics, Whatagraph), pulled live from the same content source so future comparison pages appear here automatically. Fixes a gap flagged 3 sessions running: every /compare/[slug] page's breadcrumb pointed here and it didn't exist. CollectionPage + BreadcrumbList + ItemList + FAQPage schema.internal linking / crawl-depth fix; secondary: "arlo alternatives"askarlo.app/compare
sitemap.ts / llms.txtAdded /compare to the sitemap and the AI-crawler page list.—askarlo.app/sitemap.xml

Needs your attention: a product commit from Jul 18 ("9 new/real connectors: Meta, HubSpot, Salesforce, Mailchimp, MailerLite, Pipedrive, GoHighLevel, Clarity, GTM") wired real OAuth flows and implementations for all 9 into the connections page and registry — but src/lib/connectors/catalog.ts, the file that drives public status claims, still marks most of them coming_soon/waitlist (Meta Ads' ETA "May 2026" and HubSpot's "July 2026" have both already passed). I did not ship a Meta Ads MCP page (or the other 8) off the strength of the commit message alone — that risks overclaiming if the catalog is intentionally lagging a public announcement. Need a call: flip catalog.ts to "live" for whichever of these are actually ready for agencies today, and I'll build the connector pages next session. Full detail in docs/seo-strategy/worklog.txt (top entry).

Next: pending your catalog.ts call, either ship the newly-unblocked connector pages (Meta Ads MCP is the highest-value target) or move to the blog content plan (audits/content.md). Static-rendering the marketing pages and the SE Ranking rank-tracking project both remain open and need a dedicated session / human access respectively.
